Global (All).title: Global Economic Uncertainty Spikes, Stocks Plummet
Global (All).summary: Global economic uncertainty has reached new heights, with stocks plummeting in response to trade wars and recession fears.

Global (All).title: Cyber Attack Hits Major Tech Company, Exposing User Data
Global (All).summary: A major tech company has suffered a devastating cyber attack, exposing sensitive user data and sparking concerns over cybersecurity.

Global (All).title: Protests Erupt in Global Cities Over Climate Change
Global (All).summary: Protests have broken out in major cities around the world over growing concerns about climate change and the need for urgent action to address the issue.

United States.title: Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas faces ethics investigation
United States.summary: The Supreme Court has opened an ethics investigation into Justice Clarence Thomas's purchase of a $600,000 vacation home from a conservative nonprofit group, raising concerns about his impartiality.

United States.title: White House announces new sanctions on Russia after drone incident
United States.summary: The US has imposed new sanctions on Russia in response to the downing of a US drone over the Black Sea, marking a significant escalation of tensions between the two countries.

United States.title: US inflation rate slows down but remains near 40-year high
United States.summary: The US inflation rate has slowed down to 4.7% in May, down from 5% in April, but remains near a 40-year high, raising concerns about economic stability and potential interest rate hikes.

South Korea.title: Ransomware Attack Hits South Korean Crypto Exchange
South Korea.summary: On June 23, a South Korean cryptocurrency exchange was targeted by a ransomware attack, disrupting services and potentially exposing user data. The incident highlights the need for robust cybersecurity measures in the face of increasing threats.

South Korea.title: South Korea's 'Decommissioning Day' Raises Concerns Over Nuclear Waste
South Korea.summary: South Korea's 'Decommissioning Day' has sparked concerns over the handling of nuclear waste, with some experts warning of potential environmental risks. The decommissioning process is expected to be completed by 2036.

South Korea.title: Protests Erupt Over South Korea's Military Budget
South Korea.summary: Protests broke out in South Korea over the country's military budget, with demonstrators calling for increased spending on social welfare programs. The protests were largely peaceful, but highlighted tensions between the government and opposition groups.

Japan.title: Japan’s Kishida says China’s assertiveness poses "substantial risk"
Japan.summary: Japan’s Prime Minister Fumio Kishida warns that China’s assertiveness in the region poses a "substantial risk" to the country’s national security.

Japan.title: Japan’s Nikkei rises, yen weakens as investors bet on BOJ’s stimulus
Japan.summary: Japan’s Nikkei stock index rises despite the yen weakening, as investors expect the Bank of Japan (BOJ) to continue its stimulus measures to boost the economy.

Japan.title: Japan’s PM Kishida faces backlash over COVID-19 vaccination plans
Japan.summary: Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida faces criticism over the country’s COVID-19 vaccination plans, with some lawmakers calling for a more aggressive approach to tackle the pandemic.
